name: Cheesy Broccoli-Cauliflower Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Place the ingredients in the order specified by your machine's manual.
3. Since vegetables have varying moisture content, avoid adding extra liquid until the machine has kneaded enough to extract liquid from them.
4. The dough may appear dry or crumbly initially but will form a soft, round, slightly tacky ball as it develops.
5. If the dough does not form a smooth ball by the end of kneading, add up to one tablespoon of water gradually.
